nasb.text: If he says, ‘It is good,’ your servant will be safe; but if he is very angry, know that he has decided on evil.

esv.text: If he says, ‘Good!’ it will be well with your servant, but if he is angry, then know that harm is determined by him.

cnv.text: 如果你父親這樣說：‘好！’那麼僕人就平安無事了；如果他大大發怒，你就知道，他決意要害我了。

ccb.text: 如果你父亲说‘好吧’，仆人就平安无事了。如果他发怒，就表示他决意要杀我。
